signals.npcLine: Echoes of a thousand coins flicker in neon haze.
signals.questPulse: Crypto shifts, but shadows grow longer in the grid.
signals.worldFeed: Market tides stir cautiously under fearful skies.
signals.clueEvent: New pulses detected; volatile nodes awaken.

signals.npcLine: Watch sector R: whispers hint at a rogue surge.
signals.questPulse: Harvest data spikes for RAVE, ASTEROID, and PENGU trends.
signals.worldFeed: Signals show restless trading beneath corporate radars.
signals.clueEvent: Anomaly in asset flows near digital outpost.

signals.npcLine: Fear grinds the city’s gears; trust no circuit.
signals.questPulse: Sentiment down; underground brokers scramble for control.
signals.worldFeed: Shattered confidence ripples through the crypto bazaar.
signals.clueEvent: Dark whispers hint at manipulative algorithm shifts.

signals.npcLine: Intel nodes flagged: cryptic spikes in unnamed tokens.
signals.questPulse: Trace erratic signals from shadow markets leaking info.
signals.worldFeed: AAVE and BASED flicker on clandestine data streams.
signals.clueEvent: Mysterious traders manipulate thin air valuations.

signals.npcLine: Quiet vendors whisper: 'The market’s pulse beats in fear.'
signals.questPulse: Scan chatter for cryptic patterns tied to rising doubts.
signals.worldFeed: Silent fear pervades terminals; traders hesitate.
signals.clueEvent: An encrypted message warns of rapid market shifts.
